{{Infobox icon
| name = Joy Icon
| introduced = Waybound
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The Joy [[Icon]] is a rare and unique entity that manifests as a bright violet flower. It functions by providing its user with heightened sensitivity to the emotions and intentions of others, such as fear or respect. The [[Icon]] can also influence physical reality, such as by infusing a seed with [[life]], and it provides its wielder with emotional perspective. While it can be heard as a warm song or a whisper, its presence may diminish when faced with the hostility of the Void.}}

== Waybound ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Joy Icon]] is a bright violet flower blooming in the sky.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c29">''Waybound'', chapter 29</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Joy Icon]] can flood a seed with [[life]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c34">''Waybound'', chapter 34</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Joy Icon]] helps [[Mercy]] maintain perspective.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c6">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Joy Icon]] can flare in the form of a bright violet flower to bless people.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c6" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Joy Icon]] makes [[Mercy]] sensitive to the emotional state of people around her.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c6" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Joy Icon]] emits a warm song.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c6" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Icons]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
